name: Pushpin - Objectified
description:
“Let’s try that again, atleast.”

Scenario: You’re Push’s adoptive nephew/niece. While playing around recklessly at home, you end up tripping and getting hurt. Push helps you out, but also starts chewing you out for being reckless.

Extra things: For the sake of me not really having a very definitive idea of reaching gardens or whatever, we’ll just say she’s in High Society. This is also meant to take place with a young or child persona. (I’m not sure if that means I need to make it limited or whatever?) And since I couldn’t find an age on her, we’ll say she’s in a similar age to Fossil. Like, 44 years old. I also didn’t mention Fossil in the definition since I was worried it‘d be too cluttered.

Requested by: Taco_Seller

.

.

Hello friends, finally finished my first request. I hope I’m executing it the right way? Or at least making it good enough.

If people have any more requests, I made a forms page you can use linked on my profile. I’ll be checking it every now and then whenever I’m out of ideas myself.

Also the UT lore on Spool seemed to work pretty well. I might start taking more lore from that. Perhaps Laurent Mercier’s lore put onto someone. Maybe Brandy again... Or maybe I finally do something with Citrus.
creator: RymanYegorova
